patch:
diff --git a/llvm/lib/Analysis/InstructionSimplify.cpp b/llvm/lib/Analysis/InstructionSimplify.cpp
index 3f3f6c6e0d1a..84b6ba3fc13d 100644
--- a/llvm/lib/Analysis/InstructionSimplify.cpp
+++ b/llvm/lib/Analysis/InstructionSimplify.cpp
@@ -4692,6 +4692,72 @@ static Value *simplifySelectInst(Value *Cond, Value *TrueVal, Value *FalseVal,
   if (Imp)
     return *Imp ? TrueVal : FalseVal;
 
+  Value *A, *B, *X;
+  // select (select A, B, false), true, B -> B
+  // When the condition is (select A, B, false), the result is true when both A and B
+  // are true, and B otherwise. Since true == B when both are true, this simplifies to B.
+  if (match(Cond, m_Select(m_Value(A), m_Value(B), m_Zero())) &&
+      (match(TrueVal, m_One()) || match(TrueVal, m_AllOnes())) &&
+      match(FalseVal, m_Specific(B)))
+    return B;
+  // select (select A, false, B), true, B -> B
+  if (match(Cond, m_Select(m_Value(A), m_Zero(), m_Value(B))) &&
+      (match(TrueVal, m_One()) || match(TrueVal, m_AllOnes())) &&
+      match(FalseVal, m_Specific(B)))
+    return B;
+  // select (select A, B, false), true, A -> A
+  if (match(Cond, m_Select(m_Value(A), m_Value(B), m_Zero())) &&
+      (match(TrueVal, m_One()) || match(TrueVal, m_AllOnes())) &&
+      match(FalseVal, m_Specific(A)))
+    return A;
+  // select (select A, false, B), true, A -> A
+  if (match(Cond, m_Select(m_Value(A), m_Zero(), m_Value(B))) &&
+      (match(TrueVal, m_One()) || match(TrueVal, m_AllOnes())) &&
+      match(FalseVal, m_Specific(A)))
+    return A;
+
+  // select C, true, (select C, X, false) -> C
+  if ((match(TrueVal, m_One()) || match(TrueVal, m_AllOnes())) &&
+      match(FalseVal, m_Select(m_Specific(Cond), m_Value(X), m_Zero())))
+    return Cond;
+  // select C, true, (select C, false, X) -> C
+  if ((match(TrueVal, m_One()) || match(TrueVal, m_AllOnes())) &&
+      match(FalseVal, m_Select(m_Specific(Cond), m_Zero(), m_Value(X))))
+    return Cond;
+  // select C, true, (select X, C, false) -> C
+  if ((match(TrueVal, m_One()) || match(TrueVal, m_AllOnes())) &&
+      match(FalseVal, m_Select(m_Value(X), m_Specific(Cond), m_Zero())))
+    return Cond;
+  // select C, true, (select X, false, C) -> C
+  if ((match(TrueVal, m_One()) || match(TrueVal, m_AllOnes())) &&
+      match(FalseVal, m_Select(m_Value(X), m_Zero(), m_Specific(Cond))))
+    return Cond;
+  // select C, (select C, X, false), true -> C (commuted)
+  if ((match(FalseVal, m_One()) || match(FalseVal, m_AllOnes())) &&
+      match(TrueVal, m_Select(m_Specific(Cond), m_Value(X), m_Zero())))
+    return Cond;
+  // select C, (select C, false, X), true -> C (commuted)
+  if ((match(FalseVal, m_One()) || match(FalseVal, m_AllOnes())) &&
+      match(TrueVal, m_Select(m_Specific(Cond), m_Zero(), m_Value(X))))
+    return Cond;
+  // select C, (select X, C, false), true -> C (commuted)
+  if ((match(FalseVal, m_One()) || match(FalseVal, m_AllOnes())) &&
+      match(TrueVal, m_Select(m_Value(X), m_Specific(Cond), m_Zero())))
+    return Cond;
+  // select C, (select X, false, C), true -> C (commuted)
+  if ((match(FalseVal, m_One()) || match(FalseVal, m_AllOnes())) &&
+      match(TrueVal, m_Select(m_Value(X), m_Zero(), m_Specific(Cond))))
+    return Cond;
+
+  // select C, all_ones, (C && X) -> C
+  if ((match(TrueVal, m_One()) || match(TrueVal, m_AllOnes())) &&
+      match(FalseVal, m_c_LogicalAnd(m_Specific(Cond), m_Value())))
+    return Cond;
+  // select C, (C && X), all_ones -> C (commuted)
+  if ((match(FalseVal, m_One()) || match(FalseVal, m_AllOnes())) &&
+      match(TrueVal, m_c_LogicalAnd(m_Specific(Cond), m_Value())))
+    return Cond;
+
   return nullptr;
 }

log.name: land_lor_left2
log.body:
define i1 @land_lor_left2(i1 %A, i1 %B) {
; CHECK-LABEL: @land_lor_left2(
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i1 [[A:%.*]]
  %c = select i1 %B, i1 %A, i1 false
  %res = select i1 %c, i1 true, i1 %A
  ret i1 %res
}

alive2.src:
define i1 @land_lor_left2(i1 %A, i1 %B) {
; CHECK-LABEL: @land_lor_left2(
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i1 [[A:%.*]]
  %c = select i1 %B, i1 %A, i1 false
  %res = select i1 %c, i1 true, i1 %A
  ret i1 %res
}
alive2.log:
----------------------------------------
define i1 @land_lor_left2(i1 %A, i1 %B) {
#0:
  %c = select i1 %B, i1 %A, i1 0
  %res = select i1 %c, i1 1, i1 %A
  ret i1 %res
}
=>
define i1 @land_lor_left2(i1 %A, i1 %B) {
#0:
  ret i1 %A
}
Transformation seems to be correct!

log.name: or_cmps
log.body:
define i1 @or_cmps(float %x) {
; CHECK-LABEL: @or_cmps(
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[CMP1:%.*]] = fcmp uno float [[X:%.*]], 4.200000e+01
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[CMP2:%.*]] = fcmp uno float [[X]], 5.200000e+01
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[R:%.*]] = select i1 [[CMP1]], i1 true, i1 [[CMP2]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i1 [[R]]
  %cmp1 = fcmp uno float %x, 4.200000e+01
  %cmp2 = fcmp uno float %x, 5.200000e+01
  %r = select i1 %cmp1, i1 true, i1 %cmp2
  ret i1 %r
}
